title: 7 Years
why_this_song: 7 Years by Lukas Graham (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Soon, we'll be 30 years old, our songs have been sold"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Once, I was seven years old, my mama told me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Once, I was seven years old
It was a big-big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By 11, smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "years" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "years" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "soon" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "soon" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Once, I was seven years old
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "7 Years" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "7 Years" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "7 Years" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "7 Years" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "7 Years" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "7 Years"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
